overall.description: A slow first-person drift through a flooded industrial canal surrounded by brutalist concrete retaining walls and overhead power lines. The high-quality game engine footage features hazy golden hour lighting, calm water reflections, and an abandoned, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded concrete industrial channel between retaining walls

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting forward through the flooded canal, observing the submerged concrete barriers and industrial structures

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete wall with horizontal construction joints and weathered surface
steep concrete embankment with metal fencing and vegetation on top edge
multiple high-tension electrical lines supported by tall pylons visible through the haze
partially submerged rectangular concrete blocks and traffic barriers in the water
hazy silhouettes of power pylons and industrial buildings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts slowly through a flooded industrial canal flanked by massive concrete retaining walls. Overhead power lines stretch across the hazy golden sky while partially submerged concrete barriers emerge from the calm water. The environment is completely abandoned, with no visible life or movement except for the gentle forward progression through the murky channel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial canal that maintains a mood of stagnant, golden-hour isolation. It begins by drifting slowly through a murky channel, flanked by massive, brutalist concrete retaining walls that tower over the water. As the camera progresses, the view expands to reveal partially submerged concrete barriers emerging from the calm surface, reflecting the hazy light of the sky. The scene then shifts focus toward the overhead power lines stretching across the horizon before continuing its steady, solitary glide through the abandoned environment.
